Join IFU

IFU Leadership

 IFU’s leadership brings together expertise in agriculture, technology, finance, policy, and global development to guide the organization’s strategic direction.

 

Jean D. Tchatchoua

Founder & Executive Director

Founder of IFU, leading the development of a global agricultural platform that connects farmers to markets, technology, and financing to drive food security and economic opportunity.

View Profile

A global platform uniting farmers, partners and innovators to build a sustainable, prosperous future for agriculture.
